value.stringValue:
Hi Logistics Team,

Saji has fully approved this Stock Transfer. Please see the attached Dispatch Advice to arrange the trucks.

actionCalls.name: Copy_1_of_Email_Saji_for_Approval
actionCalls.label: Copy 1 of Email Saji for Approval

value.stringValue: A new Loading Advice has been reviewed by Joy. Please review the attached advance plan to begin prepping the trucks. WARNING: DO NOT DISPATCH UNTIL FINAL FINANCE APPROVAL IS RECEIVED.

Hi Logistics Team,

Finance has fully approved this Loading Advice. Please see the attached Dispatch Advice to arrange the trucks.

Hi,

Your Loading Advice {!Get_LA_Header.Name} has been rejected. Approver Comments: {!Comments}
Loading Advice {!Get_LA_Header.Name} is awaiting Final Finance approval.
Loading Advice {!Get_LA_Header.Name} is awaiting your Level 2 approval.

assignments.name: Add_User_Email_To_Email_Collection
assignments.label: Add User Email To Email Collection

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Add_Saji_PDF_to_Envelope
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Add Saji PDF to Envelope

formulas.name: fx_LogisticsEmailRouting
formulas.expression: "suvid.sathi@gradientbitumen.com, vijay.raghavan@gradientbitumen.com, sakthi.srinivasan@gradientbitumen.com, mandlenkosi.mbulali@gradientbitumen.com, swapnil.pawaskar@gradientbitumen.com" + IF( TEXT({!Get_Loading_Advice_Line.PlantLocation_DKL__c}) = "Kaduna", ", kingsley.otujareha@gradientbitumen.com", "" )

recordLookups.name: Get_Fresh_Collection_for_Data_Table
recordLookups.label: Get Fresh Collection for Data Table

recordUpdates.name: Copy_1_of_Check_Logistics_Email_Sent_Box
recordUpdates.label: Copy 1 of Check Logistics Email Sent Box

value.stringValue: [{"apiName":"CustomerCal_DKL__c","guid":"column-365e","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Customer","wrapText":true,"order":0,"sortable":false,"label":"Customer Cal","type":"customRichText"},{"apiName":"Location_DKL__c","guid":"column-b656","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":1,"sortable":false,"label":"Location","type":"text"},{"apiName":"ProductCalc_DKL__c","guid":"column-b90b","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Product","wrapText":true,"order":2,"sortable":false,"label":"Product Calc","type":"customRichText"},{"apiName":"QuantityMT_DKL__c","guid":"column-e0ff","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":3,"sortable":false,"label":"Quantity (MT)","type":"number"},{"apiName":"LPO_Number__c","guid":"column-4b04","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":4,"sortable":false,"label":"LPO Number","type":"text"},{"apiName":"DeliveryMode_DKL__c","guid":"column-cd3b","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":5,"sortable":false,"label":"Delivery Mode","type":"text"},{"apiName":"PricePerMT_DKL__c","guid":"column-bd24","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":6,"sortable":false,"label":"Price (N/MT)","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"TransportationPerMT_DKL__c","guid":"column-f539","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":7,"sortable":false,"label":"Transportation (N/MT)","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"ProductSubtotal_DKL__c","guid":"column-5faf","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Grand Total","wrapText":true,"order":8,"sortable":false,"label":"Product Subtotal","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"HeatingPerTruck_DKL__c","guid":"column-3b14","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":9,"sortable":false,"label":"Heating Charge (N/Truck)","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"SprayerRate_DKL__c","guid":"column-5396","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":10,"sortable":false,"label":"Sprayer Rate (N/MT)","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"NumberofSprayerDays_DKL__c","guid":"column-d4be","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":11,"sortable":false,"label":"Number of Sprayer Days","type":"number"},{"apiName":"GrandTotal_DKL__c","guid":"column-5309","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Total Invoice Value","wrapText":true,"order":12,"sortable":false,"label":"Grand Total (N/MT)","type":"currency"},{"apiName":"PaymentTerm_DKL__c","guid":"column-eab2","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":false,"customHeaderLabel":"","wrapText":true,"order":13,"sortable":false,"label":"Payment Term","type":"text"},{"apiName":"PaymentStatusText_DKL__c","guid":"column-cc31","editable":false,"hasCustomHeaderLabel":true,"customHeaderLabel":"Payment Status","wrapText":true,"order":14,"sortable":false,"label":"Payment Statuss","type":"text"}]

validationRule.errorMessage: You must provide a comment when rejecting a Loading Advice.

fields.name: Copy_2_of_Success
fields.fieldText: The Loading Advice has been rejected and relevant teams have been notified.

fields.name: Success
fields.fieldText: Success! The Loading Advice has been processed and relevant teams have been notified.

fields.name: Error_Message
fields.fieldText: Error: You are not the current authorized approver for this Loading Advice.

subflows.name: Copy_1_of_Get_LPOs_for_Saji
subflows.label: Copy 1 of Get LPOs for Saji

textTemplates.name: emailBody_DiversionNote
textTemplates.text:
DIVERSION NOTE FOR {!Get_LA_Header.DivertedFrom_DKL__r.Name}

Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDate}


Dear Logistics,


A truck diversion has been fully approved by Commercial and Finance. Kindly divert the bitumen truck below loaded for {!Get_LA_Header.DivertedFrom_DKL__r.Account_DKL__r.Name} TO {!Get_LA_Header.Account_DKL__r.Name} - {!Get_Loading_Advice_Line.Location_DKL__c}.

➤ NEW LOADING REFERENCE: {!Get_LA_Header.Name}

*** The fully approved dispatch PDF is attached to this email. ***


Details are as follows:

LOAD DATETruck NoWaybill NoNET Qty (MT)Diversion Company (From)From DestinationDiversion Company (To)To Destination
{!Get_LA_Header.DivertedFrom_DKL__r.CreatedDate}{!Get_LA_Header.TruckPlateNo_DKL__c}{!Get_LA_Header.DivertedFrom_DKL__r.WaybillNumber_DKL__c}{!Get_Loading_Advice_Line.QuantityMT_DKL__c}{!Get_LA_Header.DivertedFrom_DKL__r.Account_DKL__r.Name}See Original LA{!Get_LA_Header.Account_DKL__r.Name}{!Get_Loading_Advice_Line.Location_DKL__c}

Reason:

{!Get_LA_Header.DiversionReason_DKL__c}

Note: This is an automated diversion note generated from Salesforce.

textTemplates.name: tt_InvoicingEmailBody
textTemplates.text: Hello Invoicing Team, The Loading Advice {!Get_LA_Header.Name} has been fully approved. The Loading Advice PDF is attached for your records.
